title: Heap allocation churn
symptoms: heap.alloc or malloc cost rises across the hitch frame
frequent small allocations and frees churn the heap
allocator contention or fragmentation under load
many short-lived allocations on the hot path
mechanism: Code allocates and frees heap memory at high frequency, so allocator bookkeeping (and possibly fragmentation or lock contention) accumulates into a frame-time spike.
diagnosis_hints: Check allocation count and bytes in the hitch frame; look for per-frame containers or strings being rebuilt.
typical_fixes: reserve and reuse buffers instead of reallocating each frame
use arena / frame allocators for transient data
avoid hidden allocations (string formatting, dynamic containers) in hot loops
